segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: Good morning.
segments.zh: 早上好。这里是欣钦布鲁克乡村公园，我是萨莉，一名护林员。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: Hinchinbrooke Country Park, Sally speaking.

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: I'm one of the rangers.

segments.speaker: JOHN
segments.en: Oh hello.
segments.zh: 你好。我叫约翰·查普曼，是当地一所小学的教学助理。学校让我安排两个班级来公园参观。

segments.speaker: JOHN
segments.en: My name's John Chapman, and I'm a teaching assistant at a local primary school.

segments.speaker: JOHN
segments.en: I've been asked to arrange a visit to the park for two of our classes.

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。您想了解什么？

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: What would you like to know?

segments.speaker: JOHN
segments.en: Well, I'm new to this area, so perhaps you could tell me something about the park first, please.
segments.zh: 嗯，我刚来这个地区，所以您能先给我介绍一下公园吗？

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: Of course.
segments.zh: 当然。公园总面积170英亩，也就是69公顷。主要有三种栖息地：湿地、草地和林地。林地非常成熟且多样化，有一片橡树林，还有其他混合树种区域。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: Altogether the park covers 170 acres, that's 69 hectares.

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: There are three main types of habitat: wetland, grassland and woodland.

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: The woods are well established and varied, with an oak plantation, and other areas of mixed species.

segments.speaker: JOHN
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: The wetland is quite varied, too.
segments.zh: 湿地也很多样。大约40年前，原来的农田被挖开提取砾石。工程完成后，砾石坑里充满了水，形成了两个大湖。还有几个小湖、池塘和一条流经公园的小溪。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: The original farmland was dug up around 40 years ago to extract gravel.

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: Once this work was completed, the gravel pits filled with water, forming the two large lakes.

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: There are also several smaller ones, ponds and a stream that flows through the park.

segments.speaker: JOHN
segments.en: OK, so I suppose with these different habitats there's quite a variety of wildlife.
segments.zh: 好的，我想这些不同的栖息地应该有很多野生动物吧。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: There certainly is – a lot of different species of birds and insects, and also animals like deer and rabbits.
segments.zh: 当然有——很多不同种类的鸟和昆虫，还有像鹿和兔子这样的动物。

segments.speaker: JOHN
segments.en: And I understand you organise educational visits for school parties.
segments.zh: 我知道你们还为学校团体组织教育参观。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: That's right.
segments.zh: 没错。我们可以组织各种各样的活动，并根据不同年龄进行调整。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: We can organise a wide range of activities and adapt them to suit all ages.

segments.speaker: JOHN
segments.en: Can you give me some examples of the activities?
segments.zh: 能给我举一些活动的例子吗？

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: Well, one focus is on science, where we help children to discover and study plants, trees and insects.
segments.zh: 嗯，一个重点是科学，我们帮助孩子们发现和研究植物、树木和昆虫。他们还收集并分析所看到的东西的数据。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: They also collect and analyse data about the things they see.

segments.speaker: JOHN
segments.en: Uhuh.
segments.zh: 嗯嗯。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: Another focus is on geography.
segments.zh: 另一个重点是地理。公园是一个很好的环境，可以学习和练习看地图以及用指南针在公园里导航。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: The park is a great environment to learn and practise reading a map and using a compass to navigate around the park.

segments.speaker: JOHN
segments.en: Do you do anything connected with history?
segments.zh: 你们有和历史相关的活动吗？

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: Yes, we do.
segments.zh: 是的，我们有。比如，孩子们可以探索土地的使用是如何随时间变化的。还有休闲和旅游。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: For instance, the children can explore how the use of the land has changed over time.

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: Then there's leisure and tourism.

segments.speaker: JOHN
segments.en: That focuses on your visitors, I would imagine.
segments.zh: 我想那主要是针对你们的游客吧。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: Yes, mostly.
segments.zh: 是的，大部分是。孩子们了解他们，他们的需求，他们可能造成的问题以及我们如何管理这些。我们涉及的另一个主题是音乐：在这里，孩子们用天然材料实验，创造声音，探索节奏和速度。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: The children find out about them, their requirements, the problems they may cause and how we manage these.

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: And another subject we cover is music: here the children experiment with natural materials to create sounds and explore rhythm and tempo.

segments.speaker: JOHN
segments.en: That must be fun!
segments.zh: 那一定很有趣！

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: Most children really enjoy it.
segments.zh: 大多数孩子真的很喜欢。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: And of course, all the activities are educational, too.
segments.zh: 当然，所有的活动也都有教育意义。在课堂外学习鼓励孩子们变得有创造力，并自己去探索和发现。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: Learning outside the classroom encourages children to be creative, and to explore and discover for themselves.

pairs.note: 题干和原文中都是hectares，直接对应。
题干中的Area（面积）被原文中的covers（覆盖）替换，意思相同。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'covers 170 acres, that's 69 hectares'，其中'69 hectares'直接对应题干中的面积和单位，因此答案就是69。

pairs.note: 原文直接出现'ponds and a stream'，与题干结构一致，stream即为答案。

paraphrase.explain: 题干列举了湿地中的湖泊、池塘和一条...，原文在提到两个大湖后，接着说'ponds and a stream'，因此stream是缺失的答案。

items.prompt: Science: Children look at 3 …………………… about plants, etc.

pairs.note: 原文用'收集和分析'替换了'看'，表示更具体的科学活动。
原文用'他们看到的东西'替换了'植物等'，范围更广但意思一致。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问孩子们看关于植物等的什么，原文说他们收集和分析关于所见事物的数据，因此答案应为'data'。

items.prompt: Geography: includes learning to use a 4 …………………… and compass

pairs.note: 题干说'学习使用'，原文说'学习和练习阅读'，意思相同，但表达方式不同。
题干和原文都直接出现'map'，完全一致。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问'包括学习使用一个4...和指南针'，定位句提到'学习和练习阅读地图和使用指南针'，其中'map'直接对应答案，且'learning to use'被替换为'learn and practise reading'。

items.prompt: Leisure and tourism: mostly concentrates on the park's 5 ……………………

pairs.note: 题干说'集中于公园的...'，原文直接说'休闲旅游'，是同一概念的不同表达。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问休闲旅游主要关注公园的什么，原文在提到休闲旅游后直接给出了答案'visitors'，因此定位到'leisure and tourism'即可找到答案。

items.prompt: Music: Children make 6 …………………… with natural materials, and experiment with rhythm and speed.

pairs.note: make 和 create 同义，都表示'制作'
完全相同的短语，直接定位

paraphrase.explain: 题干中的 make 对应原文的 create，natural materials 完全一致，experiment with 和 explore 同义，speed 替换为 tempo。定位到音乐主题句即可找到答案 sounds。

items.prompt: They give children a feeling of 7 …………………… that they may not have elsewhere.
Children learn new 8 …………………… and gain self-confidence.
